title: M3-01: ErrorClassification type + handler in session-manager
acceptance_criteria: ErrorClassification type defined with: transient, recoverable, user, fatal
classifyError() function takes error and returns ErrorClassification
Recoverable: agent crash (ECONNREFUSED, process exit non-zero)
Fatal: port in use, critical system errors
deliverables: New file: src/error-classification.ts or integrated in session-manager.ts
